description: The largest indoor venue on campus, used for graduation ceremonies, large lectures, and major events.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk straight along the main road.
Turn left and walk towards the trees
Look for the large hall with the distinctive roof ahead of you on the right.
The entrance to the MPH the girls blocks away from Commerce block.

description: The main sports facility on campus, housing the gym, indoor courts, and changing rooms.

steps: Enter through the main gate and follow the road on the right.
Walk straight ahead, past the engineering and science parking lots.
It is the large building on the right, before the white building.

description: Houses the Faculty of Commerce, with lecture rooms and staff offices for business-related departments.

steps: Enter through the main gate take the path on the left.
Walk past the parking lot until you see an entrace
The entrance you see leads directly into the commerce block.

description: Handles fee payments, financial clearance, and bursary queries. Located inside the Admin block.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk straight ahead, down the main walk.
Enter the hall, turn right and walk straight.
Walk past the office and dorm on the left and towards a white building ahead
Finance office is the white building.

description: The university chapel, used for religious services and sometimes official ceremonies.

steps: Walk to the road on the right.
Walk straight and past the parking lots and the sports emporium.
The Chapel is the white building.

description: Handles student accommodation matters, hostel allocation, and residence-related complaints.

steps: Enter through the main gate and down the long, diagonal walk
Enter the intersection and walk straight past it, past the girls dorms
Walk past the long building and two storey building ahead
Warden's office is just the one storey building just in front of you.

description: Provides confidential peer support and counselling services for students. Located near Lomawa hostel.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk down the long walk
Enter intersection and turn right.
Walk straight ahead, the office you are looking for is on the left.
A find a large gap with a wooden door. Peer counseling is the door to the left of that.
